review_reason: Phase 3 covering lemma proof blocked - cannot derive contradiction from intermediate MCS structure using DF axiom membership. The gap is connecting DF membership (syntactic property) to covering (structural property). See DiscreteTimeline.lean docstring and research-003.md for detailed analysis.

partial_progress.details: Phase 3 blocked on covering lemma proof. MCS.Covers and mcs_has_immediate_successor added with sorry. DF membership doesn't directly constrain order structure.

errors.message: Cannot prove mcs_has_immediate_successor: DF axiom membership constrains formulas in source MCS but does not directly imply covering (no intermediate MCS). The covering property is structural; DF membership is syntactic.
errors.recommendation: Consider: (1) Alternative proof strategy for covering, (2) Different axiom usage, (3) Accept axiom as documented technical debt for now
